title: SSC Tube South Asia Partners is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: SSC Tube South Asia Partners is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
SSC Tube South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Ghaziabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SSC Tube South Asia Partners:
SSC Tube South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SSC Tube South Asia Partners!
